Off Calendar Jun-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation of the parties" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
